name: Paulstretch for Live
author: Oli Larkin
description: Performs extreme audio time-stretching by embedding libpaulstretch, a modern C++ rewrite of Nasca Octavian Paul's Paulstretch algorithm compiled to WebAssembly, with a dialog UI including a stretch-multiplier envelope editor. Requires Ableton Live 12.4.5 Suite or later; prebuilt .ablx files are provided via GitHub Releases.
